name: Bechamel or Veloute Sauce
recipeIngredient: 2 3/4 cups Hot milk or chicken broth
Salt and freshly ground Black pepper
3/4 cup Grated Swiss cheese or Fontina
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the butter in a saucepan over medium heat.
2. Add the flour and cook, stirring constantly, for about 1-2 minutes until the mixture turns bubbly.
3. Gradually add the hot milk (or chicken broth) while continuously whisking to avoid lumps.
4. Cook, stirring frequently, until the sauce thickens and comes to a gentle boil.
5. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
6. Remove from heat and gradually stir in the cream, continuing to whisk until well combined.
7. Add the grated Swiss cheese (or Fontina) and stir until melted and incorporated.
8. Adjust seasoning if needed.
Yield: 3 cups of sauce
